: #include <stdio.h> #include <stdlib.h> struct Node {     int data;     struct Node* next; }; void traverseList(struct Node* head) {     struct Node* temp = head;     printf("Linked List: ");     while (temp != NULL) {         printf("%d -> ", temp->data);         temp = temp->next;     }     printf("NULL\n"); } int main() {     struct Node* head = malloc(sizeof(struct Node));     struct Node* second = malloc(sizeof(struct Node));     head->data = 10;     head->next = second;     second->data = 20;     second->next = NULL;     traverseList(head);     return 0; }

: All VTU students, We’ve signed almost all the evaluation sheets. Some of you have been sending emails to HR, internship, and other IDs despite clear instructions. Get Ready for the Ultimate Robotics Showdown – ROBOMANIA 2K26! The Rattle Bots Club of Channabasaveshwara Institute of Technology proudly presents ROBOMANIA 2K26 – where innovation, competition, and excitement collide! Mark your calendars for 13th April 2026 and witness the most thrilling robotics competition in Tumkur! Featured Events:  ROBO-RACE – Speed through obstacles with precision! ROBO SOCCER – Battle it out with robotic football! ROBO-SUMO – Knock out the competition in this sumo-style battle! LINE FOLLOWER – AI-powered precision on display!   MAZE RUNNER – Step into the labyrinth and test your instincts in a heart-pounding race against time! Navigate through twists, turns, and tricky dead ends in a thrilling challenge like never before! Exciting Cash Prizes Await the Champions! Last Date for Registration: 10th April 2026  Venue : Channabasaveshwara Institute of Technology, Tumkur Register Now: https://robomania2k26.netlify.app/ Find Our Location: Google Maps Link https://maps.app.goo.gl/Pu4phPmXY2zyK8188 For more updates please follow:https://www.instagram.com/rattle_bots?igsh=MTljaGRpaXZodnV5MQ== Be part of this groundbreaking event and showcase your robotic skills!

#include <DHT.h> #include <ESP8266WiFi.h> #include <ThingSpeak.h> #define DHTPIN D4 // GPIO2 #define DHTTYPE DHT11 // Change to DHT22 if using that sensor const char* ssid = "YOUR_WIFI_NAME"; const char* password = "YOUR_WIFI_PASSWORD"; const char* apiKey = "YOUR_THINGSPEAK_WRITE_API_KEY"; unsigned long channelID = YOUR_CHANNEL_ID; WiFiClient client; DHT dht(DHTPIN, DHTTYPE); void setup() { Serial.begin(115200); dht.begin(); WiFi.begin(ssid, password); ThingSpeak.begin(client); Serial.print("Connecting to Wi-Fi"); while (WiFi.status() != WL_CONNECTED) { delay(500); Serial.print("."); } Serial.println(" Connected!"); } void loop() { float h = dht.readHumidity(); float t = dht.readTemperature(); if (isnan(h) || isnan(t)) { Serial.println("Sensor read failed!")…
